about.label: // About
about.bio1: I'm a full-stack developer and designer with a passion for building products that are not only functional but beautifully crafted. My approach combines clean code architecture with pixel-perfect design.
about.bio2: I specialize in modern web technologies and love pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the browser. Every project is an opportunity to create something meaningful.

contact.label: // Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Feel free to reach out — I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations.
contact.name: Umut Yalcinkaya
